title: AL Development Advanced
description: Take your AL skills further with object types, control structures, reports, web services integration, and event-driven architecture — aligned with the MB-820 developer certification.
shortDescription: Advanced AL: reports, integration, events, and language deep dives.
learningOutcomes: Master AL data types, operators, and control structures
Understand all AL object types and their purposes
Design tables with keys, indexes, and relations
Create reports with data items and layouts
Integrate BC with external systems via web services and APIs
Build event subscribers for extension-safe customization
prerequisites: Basic understanding of tables, pages, and codeunits

modules.title: AL Language Deep Dive
modules.description: Data types, operators, expressions, and control flow in AL.

modules.title: AL Object Types
modules.description: Complete taxonomy of AL objects and advanced table design.

modules.title: Reports & Integration
modules.description: Report development and connecting BC to external systems.

modules.title: Advanced Patterns
modules.description: Event subscribers and production-grade AL architecture.
